retrieved_result: What does Svetlana mean? Svetlana [svet- lana] as a girls' name is of Russian and Slavic origin, and the meaning of Svetlana is light. Popular in Russia. Author Svetlana Stalin. ASSOCIATED WITH russian, light Variations VARIANTS Svetlanna, Svjetlana, Swetlana CREATIVE FORMS (female) (male)MIDD
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the meaning of the name Svetlana and is not related to easy DIY room decoration ideas.
